modules.name: identity
modules.description: Auth, OAuth2, RBAC, API keys, multi-tenancy

wire_code.init:
identityModule, err := identity.New(ctx, identity.Options{DB: dbPool, Log: log, Redis: redisClient, Cfg: cfg.Identity, PrivateKey: privateKey})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("identity: %w", err) }

modules.name: notifications
modules.description: Email (Resend) and SMS (Twilio) — async, template engine

modules.name: storage
modules.description: File upload, signed URLs — S3/R2/local backends

modules.name: jobs
modules.description: Background task queue, cron scheduling — no external queue needed

modules.name: billing
modules.description: Stripe subscriptions, usage metering, checkout sessions

modules.name: audit
modules.description: Immutable compliance event log — append-only, queryable

modules.name: webhooks
modules.description: Outbound HTTP event delivery — signed payloads, retry, delivery log

wire_code.init:
webhooksModule, err := webhooks.New(ctx, webhooks.Options{DB: dbPool, Log: log})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("webhooks: %w", err) }

modules.name: realtime
modules.description: WebSocket hub + Postgres CDC subscriptions — live data without polling

wire_code.init:
realtimeModule, err := realtime.New(ctx, realtime.Options{DB: dbPool, Log: log, WS: infra.WS, Cfg: cfg.Realtime})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("realtime: %w", err) }

modules.name: i18n
modules.description: Write-time translation — one target language per deployment (ar, de, fr...), async, cached

wire_code.init:
i18nModule, err := i18n.New(ctx, i18n.Options{DB: dbPool, Log: log, Cfg: i18n.Config{TargetLanguage: cfg.SpurLang, Provider: cfg.I18NProvider, OpenAIKey: cfg.OpenAIAPIKey, DeepLKey: cfg.DeepLAPIKey}, MigrationRunner: infra.Migrations.Run})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("i18n: %w", err) }

modules.name: video
modules.description: HLS streaming + RTMP ingest — live video and VOD

wire_code.init:
videoModule, err := video.New(ctx, video.Options{DB: dbPool, Log: log, HLS: infra.HLS, RTMP: infra.RTMP, Cfg: cfg.Video})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("video: %w", err) }

modules.name: agent
modules.description: LLM + pgvector memory + tool registry + Temporal durable workflows

wire_code.init:
agentModule, err := agent.New(ctx, agent.Options{DB: dbPool, Log: log, Temporal: infra.Temporal, SSE: infra.HTTP.SSE(), Cfg: cfg.Agent})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("agent: %w", err) }

modules.name: search
modules.description: Full-text search via Typesense or Meilisearch — tenant-scoped, instant results

wire_code.init:
searchModule, err := search.New(ctx, search.Options{Log: log, Cfg: cfg.Search})
if err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("search: %w", err) }
